---
title: "Cartographie Eoliennes"
---

C'est ici que devrait venir un text un peu cool :) 

```{r, echo=FALSE,include=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(sp)

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

leaflet(width = "100%") %>%
  addTiles() 

```

<!-- %>%
  addPolygons(data = map,
              fill =  cols, weight=2,col = 'grey',
              fillColor = cols,fillOpacity = op,
                  highlightOptions = highlightOptions(color='white',weight=3,bringToFront = TRUE)) -->
